case_title: APOYO FINANCIERO, INC VS. RAFAEL ERASMO GONZALEZ VASQUEZ

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY APOYO FINANCIERO, INC AS TO DEFENDANT GONZALEZ VASQUEZ, RAFAEL ERASMO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-01-2013 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $35. SERVED JAN-10-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GONZALEZ VASQUEZ, RAFAEL ERASMO
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO, INC

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-01-2013 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAY-08-2013 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. "IF NO APPEARANCE, CONTINUED FOR 4 MONTHS. DEFENDANT AGREES TO PAY 2 X 1 MONTH ON $3600.00 BALANCE", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY ROSARIO CHACON--MANAGER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO, INC

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-08-2013 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JUN-19-2013 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF.APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY JOSE PALACIOS-MANAGER.NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: M. GOODMAN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO, INC

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-19-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-19-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY JOSE PALACIOS--MANAGER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-19-2013 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO, INC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GONZALEZ VASQUEZ, RAFAEL ERASMO $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,585.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
